title: myosotis ramosissima subsp. lebelii
intro: Myosotis ramosissima subsp. lebelii, also known as Lebel's forget-me-not, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Lebel's forget-me-not include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic properties.
